title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 334.510 - License required, effective when
text:
334.510.  License required, effective when. — After October 13, 1970, no person shall hold himself or herself out as being a physical therapist or a licensed physical therapist in this state, unless such person is licensed and registered in accordance with the provisions of sections 334.500 to 334.620.
(L. 1969 H.B. 39 § 2, A.L. 1995 S.B. 452)
